description: The Petit Bar Gang is a Corsican organized crime group named after a bar in Ajaccio. It engages in extortion, money laundering, and other criminal activities, with influence in Corsica, mainland France, and abroad. Considered the most powerful criminal group in Corsica as of 2022, it has established political and economic networks. The group was founded in the 2000s and remains active.

country_links.evidence_quote: Jules Filippeddu, a restaurateur in Bonifacio and fortunate operator of slot machines in Brazil.
country_links.context: A business associate of the gang operated slot machines in Brazil.

country_links.evidence_quote: He also allegedly transported 750,000 euros in cash to fuel suspicious financial flows between Dubai, Singapore, and China.
country_links.context: The gang laundered money through suspicious financial flows involving China.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: France (including Corsica, Marseille and Paris), Italy, Luxemburg, Malta, Switzerland, Hong Kong
country_links.context: The Petit Bar Gang operates in Hong Kong as part of its territory.
